title: Virtual AI police chief introduced in Osaka amid rising imposter scams
abstract: Virtual AI police chief introduced in Osaka amid rising imposter scams may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often ...
abstract_zh: 大阪警局引入了虚拟AI警察局长，应对冒名顶替诈骗案激增的局面。这位虚拟局长虽然小众，但盯准目标，精准打击！在这个AI泛滥的时代，他可是硬核侦探，专门破解骗子的小把戏。毕竟，在大阪街头，谁能想到虚拟局长会是反诈新宠呢？
